use_cases: Displaying category labels and tags for content organization
Showing status indicators like active, pending, or closed states
Highlighting feature labels or promotional badges on product cards
Indicating count badges for notifications or cart items
Displaying skill tags or topic labels in user profiles
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) using class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features smooth hover transitions and accessible focus rings for keyboard navigation. Commonly used for status labels, category tags, feature indicators, and notification counts in SaaS and e-commerce interfaces.
